queries.question: What's the monetary value of the longest project?
queries.sql:
SELECT Monetary_Value
FROM Project
WHERE JULIANDAY(EndDate) - JULIANDAY(StartDate) = (
    SELECT MAX(JULIANDAY(EndDate) - JULIANDAY(StartDate))
    FROM Project
)
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): longest-project value via derived durationDays = DATEDIFF(End,Start) (Ontop can'

queries.question: What's the maintenance cost of Residential Building?
queries.sql:
SELECT Monetary_Value
FROM Project
WHERE Infrastructure = "Residential Building"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?monetary_value WHERE {
  ?project a :Projects .
  ?project p:Monetary_Value ?monetary_value .
  ?project p:Infrastructure ?infrastructure_f .
  FILTER(?infrastructure_f = "Residential Building")
}

queries.question: What's the maintenance cost of Residential Building?
queries.sql:
SELECT Percentage_Of_Budget
FROM Project
WHERE Infrastructure = "Residential Building"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?percentage_of_budget WHERE {
  ?project a :Projects .
  ?project p:Percentage_Of_Budget ?percentage_of_budget .
  ?project p:Infrastructure ?infrastructure_f .
  FILTER(?infrastructure_f = "Residential Building")
}
